# BP-14 negative: goroutine watches ctx.Done
lang: go
file: BP-14-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"time"
)

func run(ctx context.Context) {
	ticker := time.NewTicker(time.Second)
	go func() {
		for {
			select {
			case <-ctx.Done():
				return
			case <-ticker.C:
			}
		}
	}()
}
